hero.title: Ingest Everything. Connect Everything.
hero.subtitle: FactWeaver connects to the data sources that matter for investigations - from leaked document formats to public records databases and sanctions lists.

bidirectional.title: Automatic Extraction
bidirectional.description: Named Entity Recognition pulls people, organizations, and money from every document.

realtime.title: Real-Time Matching
realtime.description: New documents are instantly cross-referenced against your existing knowledge graph.

secure.title: Air-Gap Compatible
secure.description: All processing can run locally on isolated networks for maximum security.

extensible.title: Custom Connectors
extensible.description: Build integrations for proprietary databases and internal systems.

categories.title: Supported Data Sources
categories.subtitle: Connect to all the data sources that power your investigations.

sourceControl.title: Email Archives
sourceControl.description: Ingest PST, MBOX, and EML files with full metadata and attachment extraction.

cloud.title: Document Formats
cloud.description: PDF with OCR, Word documents, scanned images, and handwritten text.

documentation.title: Financial Data
documentation.description: CSV, Excel, and database exports for bank statements and transaction records.

projectManagement.title: Public Records
projectManagement.description: Company registries, court filings, and government databases.

communication.title: Sanctions Lists
communication.description: OFAC, EU, UN sanctions with automatic name matching and alerts.

observability.title: Web Scrapes
observability.description: HTML archives, social media exports, and web-scraped content.

custom.title: Build Custom Data Connectors
custom.description: Need to connect to a proprietary database or internal system? Our Plugin SDK gives you full access to FactWeaver's ingestion pipeline and knowledge graph.
